analysis_metadata.focus: Complete system architecture, coordinate systems, initialization pipeline, race conditions

executive_summary.overview: The Designer Widget is a complex webpack-bundled fabric.js application with multiple coordinate transformation systems and a sophisticated initialization pipeline that includes race condition prevention mechanisms.
critical_findings: Multiple coordinate systems exist across different components (canvas coordinates, template coordinates, safe zone percentages, absolute pixels)
Complex initialization pipeline with 10+ dependent scripts creates timing vulnerabilities
Coordinate transformations occur during: view switching, variation switching, template loading, design restoration, and canvas rendering
Race condition mitigation systems are in place but create complex dependency chains
The variationImages Map serves as the single source of truth for coordinate storage but undergoes transformations during save/load
executive_summary.coordinate_mismatch_risk: HIGH - Multiple transformation points and format conversions create opportunities for coordinate drift
executive_summary.race_condition_risk: MEDIUM - Mitigated by singleton patterns but timing issues still possible during rapid view/variation switches

class_structure.name: DesignerWidget
class_structure.export_mechanism: Webpack ES6 module export with global window exposure patch (line 2735-2738)
class_structure.instantiation: Single instance pattern - created via octo-print-designer-public.js as window.designerWidgetInstance

variationImages.purpose: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for all user-placed images with their transforms

templates.purpose: Template metadata including variations and views

view_structure.name: View name (e.g., 'Front', 'Back')
view_structure.has_custom_image: Flag set when user adds image

state_tracking.currentDesignId: ID of loaded design (null for new designs)

phase_2_webpack_bundles.purpose: Master canvas singleton manager - prevents double initialization
phase_2_webpack_bundles.prevents: fabric: Trying to initialize a canvas that has already been initialized error

phase_3_designer_core.purpose: Main DesignerWidget class and all business logic

phase_4_exposure_layer.purpose: Aggressive webpack intervention for DesignerWidget exposure (5 strategies)
Enhanced DesignerWidget global exposure with retry logic (20 attempts x 250ms)

phase_6_data_layer.purpose: Auto-loads designs from URL parameters with multi-method fabric detection
dependencies: None - standalone with enhanced fabric wait

init_method_sequence: 2. initializeToolbar() - Clone and setup image toolbar
12. loadInitialTemplate() - Load first template or from URL
13. loadInitialDesign() - If design_id URL param exists

critical_race_conditions.description: design-loader tries to access fabricCanvas before DesignerWidget.init() completes
critical_race_conditions.mitigation: Enhanced fabric detection with multi-method waiting (direct window.fabric, designerWidgetInstance.fabricCanvas, DOM canvas.__fabric)

critical_race_conditions.description: vendor.bundle.js loads fabric, designer.bundle.js creates canvas, singleton controllers prevent double init
User switches view while loadViewImage() is loading fabric.Image.fromURL
critical_race_conditions.mitigation: Images stored per view key, loadViewImage() checks current context
critical_race_conditions.potential_issue: Race between fabricCanvas.clear() and async image loading

system_1_fabric_canvas.name: Fabric.js Canvas Coordinates
system_1_fabric_canvas.coordinate_format: Absolute pixels from top-left, but objects use center origin

system_2_template_safe_zone.name: Template Safe Zone Percentages
system_2_template_safe_zone.units: Percentage for position, Pixels for dimensions

format.left: % from canvas left edge to center point
format.top: % from canvas top edge to center point

system_3_golden_standard.name: Golden Standard Save Format
system_3_golden_standard.description: FLAT coordinate storage format used for database persistence
system_3_golden_standard.coordinate_format: FLAT - coordinates at root level, NOT nested in transform object

system_4_legacy_variation_images.name: Legacy variationImages Format
system_4_legacy_variation_images.description: NESTED coordinate format (deprecated but still supported)

structure.templateId: Template ID (deprecated - should be in metadata)

system_4_legacy_variation_images.migration_path: design-loader.js normalizeDesignData() converts to Golden Standard

save_flow.output: Golden Standard objects[] with FLAT left/top

load_flow.process: Convert Golden Standard objects[] back to variationImages Map

view_switch_flow.step_2: Create new template background with percentage-to-pixel conversion
view_switch_flow.step_3: Create new safe zone rect with percentage-to-pixel conversion
view_switch_flow.coordinate_impact: Template positioning recalculated, user images re-loaded from variationImages Map
User image transforms applied from stored imageData.transform
CRITICAL - imageData.transform.left/top directly applied to fabricImage

user_interaction_flow.coordinate_update: Lines 1248-1256 imageData.transform = { left: img.left, top: img.top, ... }

exit_points_from_system.output: left: imageData.transform.left * widthRatio, top: imageData.transform.top * heightRatio

transformation_points.affects: Template background only - NOT user images

hypothesis_1_double_nesting.scenario: Legacy data with nested transform gets re-nested during load
hypothesis_1_double_nesting.issue: If obj already has obj.transform.left, this creates transform.transform.left
hypothesis_1_double_nesting.likelihood: LOW - Golden Standard validation prevents this
hypothesis_1_double_nesting.validation: Lines 1924-1926 check for nested transform and error

hypothesis_2_view_switch_race.scenario: User switches view while loadViewImage() is running async fabric.Image.fromURL
sequence: 1. User on View A, loadViewImage() starts loading images
5. Images added to canvas but currentView is now B
6. Coordinates stored under wrong view key
hypothesis_2_view_switch_race.mitigation: NONE DETECTED - no view context check in callback
hypothesis_2_view_switch_race.likelihood: MEDIUM - depends on user speed and network latency

hypothesis_3_percentage_misapplication.scenario: Template percentage coordinates applied to user images
hypothesis_3_percentage_misapplication.check: User images NEVER use percentage system
hypothesis_3_percentage_misapplication.confirmed: All user image coordinates are absolute pixels

hypothesis_4_origin_mismatch.scenario: Coordinates saved with center origin, loaded with corner origin

hypothesis_5_canvas_resize_during_load.scenario: Canvas dimensions change between save and load
hypothesis_5_canvas_resize_during_load.evidence: initializeCanvas() line 355-360 sets canvas to container.offsetWidth/Height
hypothesis_5_canvas_resize_during_load.issue: If container size changes (responsive design, window resize), coordinates become invalid
hypothesis_5_canvas_resize_during_load.mitigation: NONE DETECTED - no coordinate scaling on resize
hypothesis_5_canvas_resize_during_load.likelihood: HIGH - responsive layouts will cause this

hypothesis_6_legacy_correction_bug.reference: Recent commits mention legacy correction issues
commits: 3323092: FIX: View Wrapper Metadata Extraction in applyLegacyDataCorrection()
c72caca: FIX: Complete Metadata Propagation - Prevent Legacy Misclassification
dd8fc5e: FIX: Metadata Detection in View-Wrapped Format
hypothesis_6_legacy_correction_bug.likelihood: HIGH - backend coordinate modification is documented issue

race_1_designer_vs_loader.conflict: design-loader may access fabricCanvas before init() completes initializeCanvas()
race_1_designer_vs_loader.weakness: No explicit wait for init() completion, only fabric availability
race_1_designer_vs_loader.fix_suggestion: Emit custom event after init() completes, listen in design-loader

race_2_view_switch_image_load.conflict: View switch clears canvas while previous view's images still loading
race_2_view_switch_image_load.evidence: Line 1065 callback has no currentView context check
race_2_view_switch_image_load.impact: Images may be added to wrong view or lost entirely
race_2_view_switch_image_load.fix_suggestion: Capture currentView in closure, check before adding to canvas

race_3_rapid_variation_switch.conflict: Multiple template loads in flight simultaneously
race_3_rapid_variation_switch.potential_issue: Last load to complete wins, not last clicked
race_3_rapid_variation_switch.fix_suggestion: Request cancellation or request ID tracking

race_4_save_during_image_load.conflict: User saves design while images still loading from previous design
race_4_save_during_image_load.fix_suggestion: Loading state flag, disable save during load

designer_to_fabric.dependency: window.fabric must be available before initializeCanvas()

designer_to_loader.dependency: designerWidgetInstance must be created before loader runs
designer_to_loader.data_flow: loader normalizes → loader calls addImageToCanvas() → uses window.fabric directly
designer_to_loader.bypass: Loader BYPASSES DesignerWidget and uses fabric.Canvas.getInstances() directly

designer_to_backend.coordinate_validation: Backend PHP has applyLegacyDataCorrection() which may modify coordinates

sequence: 3. Image scaled to fit safe zone
7. If default variation, copy to other variations (lines 960-974)
2. Fabric.js updates img.left, img.top, img.scaleX, etc.
6. Update imageData.transform = { left: img.left, top: img.top, ... } line 1248
7. Add template background and safe zone
9. Get imagesArray for new view from variationImages
10. For each image, fabric.Image.fromURL() and configure
user_switches_view.risk_point: Step 6-10 gap where async operations can interleave

sequence: 4. For each image, create Golden Standard object with FLAT coordinates
5. Build state with objects[] and metadata
1. URL parameter design_id or auto-load data
9. For each object, restoreViewImage(variationId, viewId, imageData)
user_loads_design.coordinate_transformation: Step 11 - flat coordinates → applied to fabric.Image

bug_1_view_switch_race.description: View switch can clear canvas while previous view's images are still loading asynchronously
reproduction: 1. Load design with images on View A
2. Quickly switch to View B before images finish loading
3. View A's images may appear on View B or disappear
bug_1_view_switch_race.root_cause: No currentView context check in fabric.Image.fromURL callback
bug_1_view_switch_race.coordinate_impact: Images added to wrong view, coordinates stored under wrong key
bug_1_view_switch_race.fix: Capture currentView in closure, compare before canvas.add()

bug_2_canvas_resize_coordinate_drift.description: Absolute pixel coordinates become invalid when canvas dimensions change
bug_2_canvas_resize_coordinate_drift.root_cause: Coordinates stored as absolute pixels, not relative to canvas size
bug_2_canvas_resize_coordinate_drift.coordinate_impact: All coordinates shift proportionally to canvas size change
bug_2_canvas_resize_coordinate_drift.fix: Store coordinates as percentages or scale on load based on canvas dimensions

bug_3_backend_legacy_correction.description: Backend applyLegacyDataCorrection() may modify coordinates during save/load
bug_3_backend_legacy_correction.evidence: Multiple recent commits fixing metadata and coordinate issues in backend
bug_3_backend_legacy_correction.coordinate_impact: Backend may nest/unnest coordinates, causing corruption
bug_3_backend_legacy_correction.fix: Ensure backend respects metadata.capture_version and doesn't modify Golden Standard data

bug_4_no_save_loading_protection.description: User can save design while images are still loading from previous design
reproduction: 1. Load large design with many images
2. Immediately click save before images finish loading
bug_4_no_save_loading_protection.root_cause: No loading flag, save action always enabled
bug_4_no_save_loading_protection.coordinate_impact: Missing images = missing coordinates in saved data
bug_4_no_save_loading_protection.fix: Track loading state, disable save button during load

immediate_fixes.solution: Add currentView context check in loadViewImage() async callbacks
immediate_fixes.implementation: Capture const contextView = this.currentView at line 1044, check if (contextView === this.currentView) before canvas.add()

immediate_fixes.solution: Audit PHP applyLegacyDataCorrection() to ensure it respects metadata.capture_version
immediate_fixes.implementation: If capture_version >= 3.0.0, skip legacy correction entirely

immediate_fixes.solution: Scale coordinates on load based on canvas dimension ratio
immediate_fixes.implementation: Calculate widthRatio/heightRatio, multiply coordinates before img.set()

architectural_improvements.description: Store coordinates as percentages internally, convert to pixels only for rendering
architectural_improvements.effort: HIGH - requires refactoring entire coordinate system

architectural_improvements.description: Cancel pending image loads when view/variation changes
architectural_improvements.effort: MEDIUM - implement AbortController for fetch/Image loading

architectural_improvements.description: Centralized loading state with UI feedback
architectural_improvements.effort: LOW - add loading flag and disable controls

steps: 1. Load design with images on multiple views
2. Rapidly click through all view buttons
3. Verify each view shows correct images
4. Save and reload, verify coordinates preserved
testing_scenarios.expected_bug: Bug #1 - images appear on wrong views

steps: 1. Save design on desktop browser (full width)
4. Verify image positions relative to safe zone
testing_scenarios.expected_bug: Bug #2 - coordinates drift with canvas size

steps: 2. Immediately click save before load completes

summary.coordinate_mismatch_root_cause: Multiple transformation points combined with race conditions and backend legacy correction create opportunities for coordinate drift. The most likely causes are: (1) View switch race condition, (2) Canvas resize without coordinate scaling, (3) Backend coordinate modification during legacy correction.
summary.highest_risk_area: View switching with async image loading - no protection against race conditions
summary.recommended_first_action: Add currentView context check in loadViewImage() async callbacks to prevent race condition
